## 1. Data controller

Acme Studio S.r.l. — Via Example 1, 20100 Milan (IT) — hello@example.com

## 2. Data collected

We collect data voluntarily provided through contact forms (name, email, message) and technical navigation data (server logs, technical cookies).

## 3. Purpose of processing

Data is processed to respond to contact requests and to improve the website.

## 4. Data subject rights

Under GDPR, data subjects have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection. To exercise your rights: hello@example.com.

## 5. Retention

Contact form data is retained for 24 months from receipt, unless different legal obligations apply.
